Versatility is at the forefront with the Snapplent Ribbed Vase, featuring a spacious opening and an elongated body. As more than just a vase, this piece is a thoughtful work of art, making it an ideal gift for various occasions. Perfect for home décor, weddings, Mother's Day, and offices, the Snapplent Ribbed Vase adds a touch of beauty to every celebration and everyday living. In summary, the Snapplent Ribbed Vase is not just a container for flowers; it is a statement piece that combines quality craftsmanship, modern aesthetics, and thoughtful design, making it the perfect addition to your home or a meaningful gift for your loved ones.(Please Note do NOT attempt to resell this product on amazon as we own design rights and will take action upon any seller who attempts to resell)
